name: Game Design Pack
description: Complete game development toolkit covering all aspects from initial concept to publishing including mechanics design, level design, narrative, art direction, audio, UI/UX, analytics, and testing.
author: my-prompt-library

skills.name: Art Direction
skills.description: Define visual style and artistic vision for games

skills.name: Audio Design
skills.description: Create sound effects, music, and audio landscapes

skills.name: Economy Design
skills.description: Design in-game economies and monetization systems

skills.name: Game Analytics
skills.description: Track and analyze player behavior and metrics

skills.name: Game Concept
skills.description: Develop initial game concepts and pitches

skills.name: Game Prototyping
skills.description: Rapidly prototype game mechanics and ideas

skills.name: Game Publishing
skills.description: Publish and market games on various platforms

skills.name: Game Testing
skills.description: Test games for bugs, balance, and player experience

skills.name: Level Design
skills.description: Design engaging and balanced game levels

skills.name: Mechanics Design
skills.description: Create core gameplay mechanics and systems

skills.name: Narrative Design
skills.description: Craft compelling stories and dialogue for games

skills.name: UI/UX Design
skills.description: Design intuitive game interfaces and user experiences

installation_notes: No special installation required. Optional: Install a game engine (Unity, Unreal, or Godot) for hands-on prototyping.
